## Purpose

Describe the bounded implementation change and the evidence it produces.

## Canonical boundary

- [ ] This change does not redefine Prometheus canonical meaning.
- [ ] Claim, legal, scientific and financial implications are explicitly bounded.
- [ ] Legacy material is identified and not silently promoted.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests or documentary checks attached.
- [ ] No secrets committed.
- [ ] Generated artifacts are traceable to source.
- [ ] Rollback or reversal path documented.

## Release effect

- [ ] No release effect
- [ ] Candidate-only effect
- [ ] Requires Release Board review
